name: Lux Limousine Inc
recent_news: No public news found; appears to be a micro livery/limousine operation at residential address in Old Tappan, Bergen County.
fit_notes: Sub-scale micro-operator (4 employees, ~$318K rev, residential HQ). No confirmed school district contracts or yellow-bus fleet. Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in target unless aggregated with other Bergen Co. micro-livery SPED operators.

name: Northeast Limo
recent_news: Listed on Yelp/Nextdoor as Northeast Limousine Inc in Lodi NJ; no M&A or operational news found.
fit_notes: Micro-livery operator (4 employees, ~$318K rev) in Bergen-adjacent Lodi. No confirmed Type S/school-bus contracts. Too small to be standalone tuck-in; only of interest as a roll-up component.

name: Pristine Limousine
recent_news: Pristine Limousines LLC has a Facebook/Instagram presence as a general limo service; no school transportation news found and no link to Daniel Flint confirmed in public sources.
fit_notes: Micro-livery operator in Paramus. No verified school/SPED contracting. Not a credible standalone Summit tuck-in target.

name: Rede Limo Svc Inc
recent_news: No public news, website, or school-district contracts found; appears to be a single-vehicle livery operating from a residential address in Fair Lawn.
fit_notes: Sub-scale micro-operator; no evidence of yellow-bus or SPED contracting. Not a meaningful tuck-in candidate.

name: Rezman Express Corp
employees_est: 4-68 (D&B suggests up to ~68; USDOT shows 6 drivers)
districts_or_customers: Tri-state area charter customers (no confirmed school district contracts)
recent_news: USDOT 1904482 active, Satisfactory safety rating (May 2024). Physical address on USDOT lists Stroudsburg, PA suite, while NJ filings show Ridgefield Park PO Box and Teaneck (800 Cedar Ln) - possible related entity 'Rezman Express Inc' in Teaneck (contact Emin Kahyoglu). No M&A news.
fit_notes: Small charter bus operator (~6 buses) - primarily for-hire passenger/charter rather than contracted school bus service. Possible adjacency for charter/activity-trip work but not a core yellow-bus or SPED tuck-in. Entity-structure ambiguity (Corp vs Inc; NJ vs PA addresses) warrants diligence before any approach.
